title: Mildly Spiced Saudi-Style Cucumber Salad
description: A refreshing and flavorful salad that combines the flavors of the Middle East with a crunchy cucumber.

ingredients.name: Mildly Spiced Saudi Arabian Pepper Sauce

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the sliced cucumber and mixed greens.
In a small bowl, whisk together the Mildly Spiced Saudi Arabian Pepper Sauce, salt, white vinegar, and vegetable oil.
Pour the dressing over the cucumber and salad mixture.
Toss to coat and serve immediately.
